scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||'';if(!ua.startsWith('pnpm/')){console.error('Use pnpm instead');process.exit(1);}for(const file of ['package-lock.json','yarn.lock']){try{fs.rmSync(file,{force:true});}catch{}}"
scripts.build: corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm run typecheck:libs && corepack pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
